description:
Returns all RFIs in a specified Project.

See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified RFI Status.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[responsible_contractor_id]
parameters.description: Array of Responsible Contractor IDs. A single Responsible Contractor ID is also accepted.

parameters.name: filters[cost_code_id]
parameters.description: Cost Code ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Cost Code ID or within the specified range of Cost Code IDs.

parameters.name: filters[received_from_login_information_id]
parameters.description: Received From Login Information ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Received From Login Information ID.

parameters.name: filters[ball_in_court_id]
parameters.description: User ID. Return item(s) where the specified User ID is the Ball in Court.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Location ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Location ID or a range of Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[rfi_manager_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified RFI Manager ID.

parameters.name: filters[number]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified RFI Number.

parameters.name: filters[prefix_stage_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified RFI Prefix Stage.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search for RFIs by subject or number. This parameter will return all RFIs that match the search term.

parameters.name: sort[attribute]
parameters.description: The attribute by which to sort the list of RFIs

parameters.name: sort[direction]
parameters.description: If passed a sort attribute, determines which direction to sort
